Continue?
preview.label: Preview
preview.status.tif: Set a TIF input folder to activate the preview.
preview.status.ser: Set a SER input folder to activate the preview.
preview.status.step6: Set the Step 5 output folder to activate the preview.
preview.status.step7: Set the Step 6 output folder to activate the preview.
step06.cc.info:
White balance and chromatic aberration correction are applied per window.
Check the correction result for the first window in the preview below.
step06.cc.btn_refresh.tooltip: Preview auto-correction result from Step 5 PNG.
step06.cc.status_init: Set the Step 5 output folder to activate the preview.
step06.cc.done: Auto-calc done  ({wh})  R×{rg:.3f}  G×1.000  B×{bg:.3f}  R_shift=({rsx:+.2f},{rsy:+.2f})  B_shift=({bsx:+.2f},{bsy:+.2f})
step06.max_shift.tooltip:
Maximum allowed shift (px) during channel alignment.
Too large a value may align the wrong channels.
image_viewer.zoom_tip: Click to view at original size
spec.col.name: Name
settings.title: Global Settings
settings.desc: Configure observation target, filters, and camera mode.
step01.title: Step 1 — PIPP Preprocessing
step01.desc: Reject poor-quality frames and crop to planet center from SER files.
step02.title: Step 2 — Lucky Stacking (SER → TIF)
step02.desc: Selects the best SER frames by quality and stacks them to TIF (AS!4 replacement).
step03.title: Step 3 — Quality Assessment
step03.desc: Score each frame and select de-rotation windows.
step04.title: Step 4 — De-rotation Stacking
step04.desc: Correct for planetary rotation and stack aligned frames.
step05.title: Step 5 — Wavelet Master
step05.desc: Apply wavelet sharpening to the stacked master images.
step06.title: Step 6 — RGB Composite (Master)
step06.desc: Combine filter masters into color composite images.
step07.title: Step 7 — Wavelet Preview
step07.desc: Apply wavelet sharpening to Lucky Stacking TIF files and generate preview PNGs.
step08.title: Step 8 — Time-series Composite
step08.desc: Composite each time-slot filter set to show planetary changes over time.
step09.title: Step 9 — Animated GIF
step09.desc: Create an animated GIF from the time-series composites.
step10.title: Step 10 — Summary Grid
step10.desc: Arrange master composites into a summary contact sheet PNG.
color_mode.placeholder:
Color camera mode is coming in a future version.
Please use the monochrome camera workflow for now.
msg.restart_required: Language change will apply after restart.
app.run_all.tooltip:
Automatically runs the full pipeline starting from Step 1, 2, or 3 depending on your settings.

• Step 1 checked: runs Step 1 → 2 → ... in order.
• Step 1 off, Step 2 on: starts from Step 2.
• Both off: starts from Step 3.
• Unchecked optional steps (07, 08, 09, 10) are skipped.
• If a step fails, subsequent steps are not executed.
• Current settings are saved automatically before running.
sidebar.step.optional.tooltip:
Enable or disable this step.
Disabled steps are skipped in batch run.
settings.planet.tooltip: Selecting a planet preset automatically fills in the target name, Horizons ID, and rotation period.
settings.target.tooltip:
Short name used to identify the planet within the pipeline.
Examples: Jup (Jupiter), Sat (Saturn), Mar (Mars)
Also used for filename pattern matching.
settings.horizons_id.tooltip:
JPL Horizons body ID.
Jupiter=599, Saturn=699, Mars=499
Uranus=799, Neptune=899, Mercury=199, Venus=299
Used in Step 4 to automatically look up the north-pole position angle (NP.ang).
settings.rotation_period.tooltip:
Planet rotation period in hours.
Jupiter: 9.9281h  /  Saturn: 10.56h  /  Mars: 24.6229h
Uranus: 17.24h  /  Neptune: 16.11h
Key parameter for de-rotation correction.
settings.camera_mode.tooltip:
Mono camera: separate exposures per filter. (default)
Color camera: single Bayer RGB stream — filter list is automatically set to 'COLOR'.
settings.filters.tooltip:
Comma-separated list of filters in use.
Example: IR,R,G,B,CH4
When color camera is selected this is automatically set to 'COLOR' and disabled.
Filters appear in the Step 6 channel dropdowns in the order entered here.
settings.language.tooltip:
Select the GUI interface language.
Language change takes effect after restarting.
settings.max_workers.tooltip:
Maximum CPU cores used by the pipeline.
This system: {n} logical cores

• Step 1 (PIPP): capped at 4 cores — no benefit beyond I/O bottleneck
• Step 2 (Lucky Stack): uses the full specified count

0 = auto (Step 1: min(4, total), Step 2: all cores)
step01.ser_dir.tooltip:
Folder containing the SER video files from your capture session.
Searches all .SER files including in subfolders.
Example: D:\Capture\260402\
step01.output_dir.tooltip:
Folder where PIPP-processed SER files will be saved.
Auto-set under the global output base folder.
This path is automatically used as the SER input folder for Step 2 Lucky Stacking.
step01.roi_size.tooltip:
Square crop size (px) for PIPP output.
Set this larger than the planet disk.
448–512 px is typical for Jupiter.
step01.min_diameter.tooltip:
Minimum disk diameter (px) accepted as a valid planet frame.
Frames with smaller disks are rejected.
Filters out momentary disappearances due to atmospheric turbulence.
step02.ser_dir.tooltip:
Folder containing the SER files to stack.
Auto-filled from Step 1 output when Step 1 is run.
step02.output_dir.tooltip:
Folder where the stacked TIF files will be saved.
This output is automatically used as the input for Step 3.
step02.top_percent.tooltip:
Only the top N% of frames by quality score are used for stacking.
Lower values produce sharper results but more noise. (default: 25%)
step02.ap_size.tooltip:
Minimum patch size for the adaptive AP grid (pixels).
LoG energy analysis auto-selects 8–9 APs at per-location optimal sizes.
64 px = default (matches AS!4 default).
step02.n_iterations.tooltip:
Number of stacking iterations.
1 = recommended (no meaningful difference from 2 in practice).
2 = uses the first stack as reference for a second pass, but the improvement is negligible.
step02.sigma_clip.tooltip:
Enable sigma-clipping post-pass.
After stacking, computes per-pixel mean and std using the final stack as reference,
then discards pixels where |pixel − mean| > 2.0σ before final averaging.
Effective for removing satellite trails, cosmic rays, and transient seeing spikes,
but requires extra memory and increases processing time.
step02.n_ser_parallel.tooltip:
Number of SER files to process simultaneously.
0 = auto (cpu_count ÷ 4)
1 = sequential (default, safest)
2–4 = parallel (faster, higher RAM usage)
~950 MB RAM required per SER. Recommended on 32-core: 4.
step02.use_as4_ap_grid.tooltip:
Use AS!4 AP placement algorithm.
Greedy Poisson Disk Sampling (raster scan):
  3 layers: s, s×1.5, s×3  /  min_dist = round(ap_size × 35/64)
Session-wide sharing: APs generated once from a reference SER and shared across
all SERs (with per-SER disk offset correction).
Auto reference filter priority: IR > R > G > B > CH4 > color
Validated: 96–100% match vs AS!4 ground truth (260323/260407/260415 datasets)
step02.fourier_quality_power.tooltip:
Fourier-domain quality weighting exponent.
weight(f) = |FFT(frame)|^power — sharper frames contribute more at each frequency.
  1.0 = default (clean, try69: 66.4% Laplacian vs AS!4)
  1.5 = intermediate (try72: 115.8%)
  2.0 = aggressive (try71: 198.4%, more noise)
Higher values emphasize fine detail but amplify high-frequency noise.
step03.input_dir.tooltip:
Folder of TIF files that Step 3 will assess for quality.
Should be the Step 2 Lucky Stacking output folder.
Auto-filled by cascade but can be overridden.
step03.output_dir.tooltip:
Folder where quality score CSVs and window recommendation JSON are saved.
Set automatically.
step03.window_frames.tooltip:
Number of frames per de-rotation window.
Actual window duration = frame count × filter cycle time
Example: 3 frames × 225 s = 675 s (~11 min)
Recommended for Jupiter: 2–4 frames / Mars–Saturn: 3–6 frames
step03.cycle_seconds.tooltip:
Duration of one complete filter cycle (IR→R→G→B→CH4→IR) in seconds.
Match this to your actual capture pattern.
Example: 45 s × 5 filters = 225 s
Step 8 cycle time is set independently in the Step 8 panel.
step03.cycle_seconds_color.tooltip:
Time per single color frame capture in seconds.
Window duration = frame count × this value
Example: 3 frames × 45 s = 135 s
step03.n_windows.tooltip:
Number of best windows to find.
1 = use only the single best window (default)
2–3 = find multiple windows for Step 8 time-series compositing
step03.allow_overlap.tooltip:
Checked: multiple windows may overlap in time.
Unchecked: each window is selected from non-overlapping time slots (default).
Only meaningful when window count ≥ 2.
step03.min_quality.tooltip:
Frames below this quality score are excluded from window search.
0.0 = use all frames (disabled)
0.2–0.3 = reject clearly bad frames (clouds, blur)
Note: this is not the stacking fraction — set that in Step 4.
step04.input_dir.tooltip:
Step 2 Lucky Stacking output TIF folder.
Auto-filled by cascade.
step04.quality_dir.tooltip:
Folder containing quality score CSV files produced by Step 3.
Auto-set after Step 3 completes.
Required for the 'Auto-tune scale' button to be enabled.
step04.output_dir.tooltip:
Folder where de-rotation stacked TIF master images are saved.
Set automatically.
step04.warp_scale.tooltip:
Intensity factor for the de-rotation spherical warp.
0.0 = no correction / 1.0 = full theoretical sphere correction
0.8 = empirically optimal (Jupiter, typical seeing)
Good seeing: try 1.0–1.2
Use 'Auto-tune scale' to measure automatically.
step04.sweep_btn.tooltip:
Automatically searches for the warp_scale value that maximizes stack sharpness
based on the current Step 3 data.
Takes about 2–4 seconds. Step 3 must be complete.
step04.min_quality.tooltip:
Frames with quality scores below this value are excluded from stacking.
0.0 = include all frames. Raise to 0.3–0.5 in poor conditions.
step04.normalize.tooltip:
Normalize each frame's brightness before stacking.
Enable when there are large brightness variations due to changing seeing.
step05.output_dir.tooltip: Folder where wavelet master images are saved (auto-set)
step05.amounts.tooltip:
Wavelet sharpening strength applied to the stacked master images.
Master images have much lower noise so stronger values are safe.
step07.input_dir.tooltip: Step 2 Lucky Stacking output TIF folder (auto-set)
step07.output_dir.tooltip: Folder where wavelet preview PNGs are saved (auto-set)
step07.amounts.tooltip:
Wavelet layer sharpening strengths L1–L6.
L1 = finest detail, L6 = largest structure.
For planetary imaging, activating only L1–L3 is recommended.
step07.border_taper.tooltip:
Applies a soft feathered border to the image edges.
0 = disabled (recommended). Use only when ringing artifacts are severe.
step08.input_dir.tooltip: Step 2 Lucky Stacking output TIF folder (auto-set)
step08.output_dir.tooltip: Folder where time-series RGB composite PNGs are saved (auto-set)
step08.global_normalize.tooltip:
Normalizes the brightness range of each filter across all frames.
Greatly reduces color inconsistency between GIF frames in Step 9.
When enabled, disabling Step 9 global channel stretch is recommended.
step08.series_scale.tooltip:
Brightness multiplier applied to each composite frame.
1.0 = unchanged (default)
Preserves the distribution shape while scaling brightness.
step08.stack_window_n.tooltip:
Number of frames in the sliding window stack.
1 = single frame / 3 = SNR ×√3 / 5 = SNR ×√5
Recommended upper limit for Jupiter: 5 / Use odd numbers
step08.cycle_seconds.tooltip:
Duration of one filter cycle (IR→R→G→B→CH4→IR) in seconds.
Used to group raw TIF files into time-series frame sets.
Set independently from the Step 3 cycle time.
step08.cycle_seconds_color.tooltip:
Interval between consecutive color captures in seconds.
Used to group TIF files into time-series frames.
Set slightly larger than the actual capture interval to be safe.
step08.stack_min_quality.tooltip:
Frame quality filter. (0.0 = no filter)
Softly reduces the contribution of low-quality frames (not a hard cutoff).
Recommended: 0.05–0.3
step08.save_mono_frames.tooltip:
Saves individual mono filter frames alongside the color composite.
Step 9 will also automatically generate per-filter mono GIFs.
step08.series_spec_header.tooltip:
Specifies composite channels for time-series, independent from Step 6.
Does not affect Step 6 composite settings.
step08.series_amounts.tooltip:
Wavelet sharpening strength for each time-series composite frame.
Adjusted independently from Step 5 (master).
L1 handles fine detail; higher layers handle broader structures.
step09.output_dir.tooltip: Folder where animated GIF files are saved (auto-set)
step09.fps.tooltip:
Playback speed for the animated GIF.
6–10 FPS is generally recommended.
step09.resize.tooltip:
Output size scale factor for the GIF.
1.0 = original size, 0.5 = half size (reduces file size).
step10.output_dir.tooltip: Folder where summary grid PNG files are saved (auto-set)
step10.black_point.tooltip:
Pixels below this value are rendered as pure black.
Suppresses background noise for a cleaner planet background. (0.0–0.5)
step10.gamma.tooltip:
Gamma correction value.
1.0 = linear / < 1.0 = brighter / > 1.0 = darker
0.8–1.0 is recommended to emphasize planetary surface detail.
step10.cell_size.tooltip: Size (px) of each image cell in the summary grid. (100–1024 px)
batch.dialog.title: Batch Run Confirmation
batch.error_banner: Validation errors found. Please fix the highlighted step settings before running.
validate.no_ser_dir: SER input folder is not set.
validate.no_tif_dir: TIF input folder is not set.
validate.no_tif_lucky: No TIF input files found. Please run Step 2 (Lucky Stacking) first.
validate.files_insufficient: Insufficient files: {wf} frames × {nw} windows = {req} required, found {n}
validate.high_threshold: Quality threshold ({t:.2f}) is very high. Most frames may be excluded.
validate.no_rotation_period: Rotation period is not set. Please enter it in Settings.
validate.no_horizons_id: Horizons ID is not set. Position correction will be disabled.
validate.no_derotation_tif: No De-rotation TIF found. Please run Step 4 first.
validate.no_wavelet_png: No Wavelet Master PNG found. Please run Step 5 first.
validate.no_series_result: No time-series result found. Please run Step 8 first.
validate.no_rgb_png_step6: No RGB composite PNG found. Please run Step 6 first.
sweep.error.no_step3: Step 3 data not found. Please run Step 3 first.
sweep.error.filter_insufficient: Not enough frames for filter '{f}' (minimum 2 required).

Automates step-by-step post-processing.
